text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Thank you for the day off!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I worked hard yesterday, you know! I did a big
cleanup of the whole dorm with Hishiama and the
other Miho residents!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I really got down to it and finished everything in a
jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And then everyone praised me for how good I was
at cleaning and tidying. You should've seen their
smiling faces!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's so refreshing to have a clean room! I sure can
get a lot done if I put my mind to it! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Sakura Chiyono O had a very
productive day off.
